subcodes.first_line: O ye lovers of the Abha Beauty! When souls become attracted to the variegated colours and physical beauty of this contingent existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشقان جمال ابهی اهل مجاز چون تعلق خاطری باب و رنگ در عالم خاک یابند از
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @music and singing, @martyrs and martyrdom
